headline: Built for Baku
subheadline: Custom AI systems to help small B2B sales consulting firms like Baku streamline repeatable sales processes for product-led companies

challenges.title: Brand Visibility
challenges.desc: As a small firm with 1-10 employees, Baku struggles to stand out against larger competitors in B2B consulting - This limits lead generation on platforms like LinkedIn - Focusing on professional networking is key to building audience trust

challenges.title: Sales Process Discovery
challenges.desc: Baku helps product-led companies find repeatable sales but faces internal challenges in scaling these for their own operations - This creates inefficiencies in client delivery - Their Brooklyn base adds pressure to compete nationally

challenges.title: Resource Constraints
challenges.desc: With a small team, Baku deals with limited resources for AI tools in SaaS consulting - This slows down innovation in sales infrastructure - They must prioritize strategic networking to offset these gaps

challenges.title: Founder-Led Sales
challenges.desc: Baku supports pre-revenue founder-led sales but encounters difficulties in applying this internally - This affects their ability to qualify leads effectively - Competing in a crowded market demands better predictive tools

deliverables.title: Sales Process AI System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated workflows for discovering repeatable sales processes and integrates with existing CRM tools to enhance efficiency for B2B consulting

deliverables.title: Lead Qualification Engine
deliverables.desc: Creates predictive models for lead scoring and qualification, integrating with LinkedIn for better networking and targeting product-led companies

deliverables.title: Branding Visibility Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops tools to boost brand presence on professional platforms and integrates with content systems for consistent messaging in sales consulting

deliverables.title: Scalable Resource Hub
deliverables.desc: Constructs a centralized hub for managing team resources and AI tools, integrating with SaaS platforms to address small-team constraints

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Conduct initial audit of Baku's sales processes and identify key pain points

engagementSteps.title: Design Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop customized AI blueprints and plan integrations with their tech stack

engagementSteps.title: Implementation Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Roll out the new systems and train the team for ongoing optimization

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate and optimize sales processes for B2B firms.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with our tools?
faqItems.answer: We tailor integrations to your existing CRM and social platforms.

faqItems.question: Is this suitable for small teams?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's designed for firms with 1-10 employees to scale efficiently.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Improved lead qualification and repeatable sales processes based on real data.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months, with ongoing support options.

faqItems.question: What about costs?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary by needs; we base them on your specific business context.

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages CRM and lead tracking for sales consulting

stackItems.name: LinkedIn Sales Navigator
stackItems.role: Handles professional networking and lead generation

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Integrates for advanced SaaS sales automation

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Tracks website traffic and user behavior for optimization

stackItems.name: Zapier
stackItems.role: Automates workflows between tools for efficiency
